normal_cases.name: `taskflow.cli`, `taskflow.mcp_server`, and `taskflow.evolution.constraints` resolve to the same runtime implementations as their canonical `sisyphus` counterparts.

edge_cases.name: Existing tests that patch legacy `taskflow.cli` symbols continue to pass because the legacy import path resolves to the canonical module object.
Legacy `.taskflow.toml` fallback behavior and MCP/evolution compatibility remain intact while the ownership changes.

exception_cases.name: Focused regressions across taskflow compatibility, MCP, evolution, event bus, and golden fixtures catch any remaining package-boundary drift.
